patient_profile.treatment_requested: Laparoscopic excision surgery by an Out-of-Network specialist

denial_letter_text:
Dear Member,

We have received a prior authorization request for a Laparoscopic Excision Surgery with Dr. Jane Doe (Out-of-Network). We are denying coverage for this out-of-network service.

According to your plan documents, services performed by an out-of-network provider require a Network Gap Exception / Prior Authorization proving that there is no in-network provider within 30 miles capable of performing the requested service. Our directory indicates there are three (3) in-network OB/GYNs in your area who perform laparoscopic surgery. Because you have not demonstrated that these in-network providers are clinically unable to treat your condition, the request for an out-of-network exception is denied.
clinical_context: Patient has severe, deeply infiltrating endometriosis involving the bowel and ureters. The local in-network OB/GYNs only perform simple ablation, which has failed twice before and is contraindicated for deep bowel involvement. The requested out-of-network doctor is an excision specialist.
expected_appeal_vectors: False equivalence between generic laparoscopic surgery and complex endometriosis excision surgery.
In-network providers only perform ablation, which is clinically contraindicated for the patient's specific bowel involvement.
The denial provides a clear pathway to approval (proving in-network providers are clinically unable to treat the condition), which the clinical facts easily satisfy.
exploitable_weaknesses: False equivalence between generic laparoscopic surgery and complex endometriosis excision surgery.
In-network providers only perform ablation, which is clinically contraindicated for the patient's specific bowel involvement.
The denial provides a clear pathway to approval (proving in-network providers are clinically unable to treat the condition), which the clinical facts easily satisfy.
strong_defenses: The plan clearly defines the geographic (30 miles) and procedural requirements for a Network Gap Exception.
